---
title: "Example Usage"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{example-usage}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(fatherStay)
library(ggplot2)
```

This vignette subject to change, and will likely be out of date very shortly.

```{r}
df <- simulate_data() |>
  dplyr::filter(prov == "ON")
tail(df, 12) # last 10 are NA - to be nowcast!
```


```{r}
dadnow2 <- nowcast_one(
  dad ~ npos, df, model = "ar", date_col = "date", params = list(order = 1)
)

dadnow2 <- add_model(dadnow2, model = "ar", params = list(order = 2)) |>
  add_model(model = "lm") |>
  add_model(model = "arx", params = list(order = 1)) |>
  add_model(model = "gam", params = list(smooths = list("npos"=10)))
dadnow2
autoplot(dadnow2, last_n = 15)
```
